 14→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.FAILURE
 15→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.IDLE

 23→import kotlin.properties.Delegates
 24→
 25→class SiteCreationServiceManager @Inject constructor(
 26→    private val createSiteUseCase: CreateSiteUseCase,
 27→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
 28→    private val tracker: SiteCreationTracker,
 29→    @Named(BG_THREAD) private val bgDispatcher: CoroutineDispatcher
 30→) : CoroutineScope {
 31→    private val job = Job()
 32→    override val coroutineContext: CoroutineContext
 33→        get() = bgDispatcher + job
 34→
 35→    private lateinit var siteData: SiteCreationServiceData
 36→    private lateinit var languageId: String
 37→    private lateinit var timeZoneId: String
 38→    private lateinit var serviceListener: SiteCreationServiceManagerListener
 39→    private var isRetry by Delegates.notNull<Boolean>()
 40→    private var newSiteRemoteId by Delegates.notNull<Long>()
 41→    private var newSiteUrl by Delegates.notNull<String>()
 42→
 43→    fun onStart(
 44→        languageWordPressId: String,
 45→        timeZoneId: String,
 46→        previousState: String?,
 47→        data: SiteCreationServiceData,
 48→        serviceListener: SiteCreationServiceManagerListener
 49→    ) {
 50→        languageId = languageWordPressId
 51→        this.timeZoneId = timeZoneId
 52→        siteData = data
 53→        this.serviceListener = serviceListener
 54→
 55→        executePhase(IDLE)
 56→
 57→        isRetry = previousState != null
 58→
 59→        val phaseToExecute = if (isRetry) {
 60→            SiteCreationStep.valueOf(previousState!!)
 61→        } else {
 62→            CREATE_SITE
 63→        }
 64→
 65→        if (SiteCreationServiceState(phaseToExecute).isTerminal) {
 66→            AppLog.e(T.SITE_CREATION, "IllegalState: SiteCreationService can't resume a terminal step!")
 67→        } else {
 68→            executePhase(phaseToExecute)
 69→        }
 70→    }
 71→
 72→    fun onCreate() {
 73→        dispatcher.register(createSiteUseCase)
 74→    }
 75→
 76→    fun onDestroy() {
 77→        dispatcher.unregister(createSiteUseCase)
 78→    }
 79→
 80→    private fun executePhase(phase: SiteCreationStep) {
 81→        when (phase) {
 82→            IDLE -> updateServiceState(IDLE)
 83→            CREATE_SITE -> {
 84→                updateServiceState(CREATE_SITE)
 85→                createSite()
 86→            }
 87→            SUCCESS -> {
 88→                updateServiceState(SUCCESS, Pair(newSiteRemoteId, newSiteUrl))
 89→                // This stat is part of a funnel that provides critical information.  Before
 90→                // making ANY modification to this stat please refer to: p4qSXL-35X-p2
 91→                tracker.trackSiteCreated(siteData.siteDesign)
 92→            }
 93→            FAILURE -> {
 94→                val currentState = serviceListener.getCurrentState()
 95→                AppLog.e(
 96→                    T.SITE_CREATION,
 97→                    "SiteCreationService entered state FAILURE while on step: ${currentState?.step?.name}"
 98→                )
 99→                updateServiceState(FAILURE, currentState)
100→            }
101→        }
102→    }
103→
104→    private fun createSite() {
105→        launch {
106→            AppLog.i(
107→                T.SITE_CREATION,
108→                "Dispatching Create Site Action, SiteName: ${siteData.domain}, isFree: ${siteData.isFree}"
109→            )
110→            val createSiteEvent: OnNewSiteCreated
111→            try {
112→                createSiteEvent = createSiteUseCase.createSite(siteData, languageId, timeZoneId)
113→            } catch (e: IllegalStateException) {
114→                AppLog.e(T.SITE_CREATION, e.message ?: "Unexpected error.")
115→                executePhase(FAILURE)
116→                return@launch
117→            }
118→
119→            newSiteRemoteId = createSiteEvent.newSiteRemoteId
120→            newSiteUrl = createSiteEvent.url ?: ""
121→            AppLog.i(T.SITE_CREATION, createSiteEvent.toString())
122→            if (createSiteEvent.isError) {
123→                if (createSiteEvent.error.type == SiteStore.NewSiteErrorType.SITE_NAME_EXISTS) {
124→                    if (isRetry) {
125→                        // Move to the next step. The site was already created on the server by our previous attempt.
126→                        AppLog.w(
127→                            T.SITE_CREATION,
128→                            "WPCOM site already created but we are in retrying mode so, just move on."
129→                        )
130→                        executePhase(SUCCESS)
131→                    } else {
132→                        /**
133→                         * This state should not happen in production unless the domain suggestion endpoint is broken.
134→                         * There is a very low chance two users picked the same domain at the same time and only
135→                         * the first got it.
136→                         */
137→                        val errorMsg = "Site already exists - seems like an issue with domain suggestions endpoint"
138→                        AppLog.e(T.SITE_CREATION, errorMsg)
139→                        throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)
140→                    }
141→                } else {
142→                    executePhase(FAILURE)
143→                }
144→            } else {
145→                executePhase(SUCCESS)
146→            }
147→        }
148→    }
149→
150→    /**
151→     * Helper method to create a new State object and set it as the new state.
152→     *
153→     * @param step The step of the new state
154→     * @param payload The payload to attach to the new state
155→     */
156→    private fun updateServiceState(step: SiteCreationStep, payload: Any? = null) {
157→        serviceListener.updateState(SiteCreationServiceState(step, payload))
158→    }
159→
160→    interface SiteCreationServiceManagerListener {
161→        fun getCurrentState(): SiteCreationServiceState?
162→
163→        fun updateState(state: SiteCreationServiceState)
164→    }
165→}

1→package org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.usecases
 2→
 3→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.Subscribe
 4→import org.greenrobot.eventbus.ThreadMode
 5→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher

 9→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.OnNewSiteCreated
10→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.SiteVisibility
11→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.SiteVisibility.PUBLIC
12→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceData
13→import org.wordpress.android.util.UrlUtilsWrapper
14→import javax.inject.Inject
15→import kotlin.coroutines.Continuation
16→import kotlin.coroutines.resume
17→import kotlin.coroutines.suspendCoroutine
18→
19→/**
20→ * Transforms OnNewSiteCreated EventBus event to a coroutine.
21→ */
22→class CreateSiteUseCase @Inject constructor(
23→    private val dispatcher: Dispatcher,
24→    @Suppress("unused") private val siteStore: SiteStore,
25→    private val urlUtilsWrapper: UrlUtilsWrapper
26→) {
27→    private var continuation: Continuation<OnNewSiteCreated>? = null
28→
29→    @Suppress("UseCheckOrError")
30→    suspend fun createSite(
31→        siteData: SiteCreationServiceData,
32→        languageWordPressId: String,
33→        timeZoneId: String,
34→        siteVisibility: SiteVisibility = PUBLIC,
35→        dryRun: Boolean = false
36→    ): OnNewSiteCreated {
37→        if (continuation != null) {
38→            throw IllegalStateException("Create site request has already been sent.")
39→        }
40→        /*
41→         * To create a site with WordPress.com sub-domain, we need to pass the domain name without the "wordpress.com"
42→         * whereas to create a site with other domains, we need to pass the full url. This issue is addressed
43→         * in this use case since it's closest to the network layer.
44→         *
45→         * Ideally API wouldn't work like this or if it does FluxC is the one that handles the issue. However, at the
46→         * time of this comment, changing FluxC's Payload might end up affecting the old site creation flow,
47→         * so the workaround is applied here instead.
48→         */
49→        val domain = when {
50→            siteData.domain.isNullOrEmpty() -> null
51→            isWordPressComSubDomain(siteData.domain) -> urlUtilsWrapper.extractSubDomain(siteData.domain)
52→            else -> siteData.domain
53→        }
54→        return suspendCoroutine { cont ->
55→            val newSitePayload = NewSitePayload(
56→                domain,
57→                siteData.title,
58→                languageWordPressId,
59→                timeZoneId,
60→                siteVisibility,
61→                siteData.segmentId,
62→                siteData.siteDesign,
63→                dryRun,
64→                findAvailableUrl = if (siteData.isFree) null else true
65→            )
66→            continuation = cont
67→            dispatcher.dispatch(SiteActionBuilder.newCreateNewSiteAction(newSitePayload))
68→        }
69→    }
70→
71→    @Suppress("unused")
72→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.BACKGROUND)
73→    fun onNewSiteCreated(event: OnNewSiteCreated) {
74→        continuation?.resume(event)
75→        continuation = null
76→    }
77→}
78→
79→fun isWordPressComSubDomain(url: String) = url.endsWith(".wordpress.com")

  3→import kotlinx.coroutines.ExperimentalCoroutinesApi
  4→import org.assertj.core.api.Assertions.assertThat
  5→import org.junit.Before
  6→import org.junit.Test
  7→import org.junit.runner.RunWith
  8→import org.mockito.Mock
  9→import org.mockito.junit.MockitoJUnitRunner
 10→import org.mockito.kotlin.argumentCaptor
 11→import org.mockito.kotlin.times
 12→import org.mockito.kotlin.verify
 13→import org.mockito.kotlin.whenever
 14→import org.wordpress.android.BaseUnitTest
 15→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.Dispatcher
 16→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.NewSiteError
 17→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.NewSiteErrorType.GENERIC_ERROR
 18→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.NewSiteErrorType.SITE_NAME_EXISTS
 19→import org.wordpress.android.fluxc.store.SiteStore.OnNewSiteCreated
 20→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.misc.SiteCreationTracker
 21→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceManager.SiteCreationServiceManagerListener
 22→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.CREATE_SITE
 23→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.FAILURE
 24→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.IDLE
 25→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.services.SiteCreationServiceState.SiteCreationStep.SUCCESS
 26→import org.wordpress.android.ui.sitecreation.usecases.CreateSiteUseCase
 27→
 28→private const val LANGUAGE_ID = "lang_id"
 29→private const val TIMEZONE_ID = "timezone_id"
 30→private const val NEW_SITE_REMOTE_ID = 1234L
 31→private const val NEW_SITE_REMOTE_URL = "new.site.url"
 32→
 33→private val DUMMY_SITE_DATA: SiteCreationServiceData = SiteCreationServiceData(
 34→    123,
 35→    "slug",
 36→    "domain",
 37→    null,
 38→    true,
 39→)
 40→
 41→private val IDLE_STATE = SiteCreationServiceState(IDLE)
 42→private val CREATE_SITE_STATE = SiteCreationServiceState(CREATE_SITE)
 43→private val SUCCESS_STATE = SiteCreationServiceState(SUCCESS, Pair(NEW_SITE_REMOTE_ID, NEW_SITE_REMOTE_URL))
 44→private val FAILURE_STATE = SiteCreationServiceState(FAILURE)
 45→
 46→@ExperimentalCoroutinesApi
 47→@RunWith(MockitoJUnitRunner::class)
 48→class SiteCreationServiceManagerTest : BaseUnitTest() {
 49→    @Mock
 50→    lateinit var useCase: CreateSiteUseCase
 51→
 52→    @Mock
 53→    lateinit var dispatcher: Dispatcher
 54→
 55→    @Mock
 56→    lateinit var serviceListener: SiteCreationServiceManagerListener
 57→
 58→    @Mock
 59→    lateinit var tracker: SiteCreationTracker
 60→
 61→    private lateinit var manager: SiteCreationServiceManager
 62→
 63→    private lateinit var successEvent: OnNewSiteCreated
 64→    private val genericErrorEvent = OnNewSiteCreated()
 65→    private lateinit var siteExistsErrorEvent: OnNewSiteCreated
 66→
 67→    @Before
 68→    fun setUp() {
 69→        manager = SiteCreationServiceManager(
 70→            useCase,
 71→            dispatcher,
 72→            tracker,
 73→            testDispatcher()
 74→        )
 75→        successEvent = OnNewSiteCreated(newSiteRemoteId = NEW_SITE_REMOTE_ID, url = NEW_SITE_REMOTE_URL)
 76→        siteExistsErrorEvent = OnNewSiteCreated(newSiteRemoteId = NEW_SITE_REMOTE_ID, url = NEW_SITE_REMOTE_URL)
 77→        genericErrorEvent.error = NewSiteError(GENERIC_ERROR, "")
 78→        siteExistsErrorEvent.error = NewSiteError(SITE_NAME_EXISTS, "")
 79→    }
 80→
 81→    @Test
 82→    fun verifyServiceStateIsBeingUpdated() = test {
 83→        setSuccessfulResponses()
 84→        startFlow()
 85→
 86→        argumentCaptor<SiteCreationServiceState>().apply {
 87→            verify(serviceListener, times(3)).updateState(capture())
 88→            assertThat(allValues[0]).isEqualTo(IDLE_STATE)
 89→            assertThat(allValues[1]).isEqualTo(CREATE_SITE_STATE)
 90→            assertThat(allValues[2]).isEqualTo(SUCCESS_STATE)
 91→        }
 92→    }
 93→
 94→    @Test
 95→    fun verifyServiceStateUpdateToFailureOnError() = test {
 96→        setGenericErrorResponses()
 97→        startFlow()
 98→
 99→        argumentCaptor<SiteCreationServiceState>().apply {
100→            verify(serviceListener, times(3)).updateState(capture())
101→            assertThat(allValues[0]).isEqualTo(IDLE_STATE)
102→            assertThat(allValues[1]).isEqualTo(CREATE_SITE_STATE)
103→            assertThat(allValues[2]).isEqualTo(SiteCreationServiceState(FAILURE))
104→        }
105→    }
106→
107→    @Test
108→    fun verifyServicePropagatesCurrentStateWhenFails() = test {
109→        setGenericErrorResponses()
110→        val stateBeforeFailure = CREATE_SITE_STATE
111→        whenever(serviceListener.getCurrentState()).thenReturn(stateBeforeFailure)
112→
113→        startFlow()
114→
115→        argumentCaptor<SiteCreationServiceState>().apply {
116→            verify(serviceListener, times(3)).updateState(capture())
117→            assertThat(allValues[0]).isEqualTo(IDLE_STATE)
118→            assertThat(allValues[1]).isEqualTo(CREATE_SITE_STATE)
119→            assertThat(allValues[2]).isEqualTo(FAILURE_STATE.copy(payload = stateBeforeFailure))
120→        }
121→    }
122→
123→    @Test
124→    fun verifyRetryWorksWhenTheSiteWasCreatedInPreviousAttempt() = test {
125→        setSiteExistsErrorResponses()
126→        retryFlow(previousState = CREATE_SITE_STATE.stepName)
127→
128→        val argumentCaptor = argumentCaptor<SiteCreationServiceState>()
129→        argumentCaptor.apply {
130→            verify(serviceListener, times(3)).updateState(capture())
131→            assertThat(allValues[0]).isEqualTo(IDLE_STATE)
132→            assertThat(allValues[1]).isEqualTo(CREATE_SITE_STATE)
133→            assertThat(allValues[2]).isEqualTo(SUCCESS_STATE)
134→        }
135→    }
136→
137→    @Test
138→    fun verifyRetryWorksWhenCreateSiteRequestFailed() = test {
139→        setGenericErrorResponses()
140→        startFlow()
141→
142→        setSuccessfulResponses()
143→        retryFlow(previousState = CREATE_SITE_STATE.stepName)
144→
145→        val argumentCaptor = argumentCaptor<SiteCreationServiceState>()
146→        argumentCaptor.apply {
147→            verify(serviceListener, times(6)).updateState(capture())
148→            assertThat(allValues[0]).isEqualTo(IDLE_STATE)
149→            assertThat(allValues[1]).isEqualTo(CREATE_SITE_STATE)
150→            assertThat(allValues[2]).isEqualTo(FAILURE_STATE)
151→
152→            assertThat(allValues[3]).isEqualTo(IDLE_STATE)
153→            assertThat(allValues[4]).isEqualTo(CREATE_SITE_STATE)
154→            assertThat(allValues[5]).isEqualTo(SUCCESS_STATE)
155→        }
156→    }
157→
158→    @Test
159→    fun verifyUseCaseRegisteredToDispatcherOnCreate() {
160→        manager.onCreate()
161→        argumentCaptor<CreateSiteUseCase>().apply {
162→            verify(dispatcher).register(capture())
163→            assertThat(allValues[0]).isEqualTo(useCase)
164→        }
165→    }
166→
167→    @Test
168→    fun verifyUseCaseUnregisteredFromDispatcherOnDestroy() {
169→        manager.onDestroy()
170→        argumentCaptor<CreateSiteUseCase>().apply {
171→            verify(dispatcher).unregister(capture())
172→            assertThat(allValues[0]).isEqualTo(useCase)
173→        }
174→    }
175→
176→    @Test
177→    fun verifyDispatcherRegistrationHandledCorrectly() = test {
178→        setGenericErrorResponses()
179→        manager.onCreate()
180→        startFlow()
181→        setSuccessfulResponses()
182→        retryFlow(previousState = CREATE_SITE_STATE.stepName)
183→        manager.onDestroy()
184→        argumentCaptor<CreateSiteUseCase>().apply {
185→            verify(dispatcher).register(capture())
186→            assertThat(allValues[0]).isEqualTo(useCase)
187→        }
188→        argumentCaptor<CreateSiteUseCase>().apply {
189→            verify(dispatcher).unregister(capture())
190→            assertThat(allValues[0]).isEqualTo(useCase)
191→        }
192→    }
193→
194→    @Test
195→    fun verifyIllegalStateExceptionInUseCaseResultsInServiceErrorState() = test {
196→        whenever(useCase.createSite(DUMMY_SITE_DATA, LANGUAGE_ID, TIMEZONE_ID))
197→            .thenThrow(IllegalStateException("Error"))
198→        startFlow()
199→        argumentCaptor<SiteCreationServiceState>().apply {
200→            verify(serviceListener, times(3)).updateState(capture())
201→            assertThat(allValues[0]).isEqualTo(IDLE_STATE)
202→            assertThat(allValues[1]).isEqualTo(CREATE_SITE_STATE)
203→            assertThat(allValues[2]).isEqualTo(SiteCreationServiceState(FAILURE))
204→        }
205→    }
206→
207→    private fun startFlow() {
208→        manager.onStart(LANGUAGE_ID, TIMEZONE_ID, null, DUMMY_SITE_DATA, serviceListener)
209→    }
210→
211→    private fun retryFlow(previousState: String) {
212→        manager.onStart(LANGUAGE_ID, TIMEZONE_ID, previousState, DUMMY_SITE_DATA, serviceListener)
213→    }
214→
215→    private suspend fun setSuccessfulResponses() = test {
216→        whenever(useCase.createSite(DUMMY_SITE_DATA, LANGUAGE_ID, TIMEZONE_ID))
217→            .thenReturn(successEvent)
218→    }
219→
220→    private suspend fun setGenericErrorResponses() = test {
221→        whenever(useCase.createSite(DUMMY_SITE_DATA, LANGUAGE_ID, TIMEZONE_ID))
222→            .thenReturn(genericErrorEvent)
223→    }
224→
225→    private suspend fun setSiteExistsErrorResponses() = test {
226→        whenever(useCase.createSite(DUMMY_SITE_DATA, LANGUAGE_ID, TIMEZONE_ID))
227→            .thenReturn(siteExistsErrorEvent)
228→    }
229→}

content.text:
The issue was an `IllegalStateException` being thrown in `SiteCreationServiceManager.kt` when the site creation API returns a "Site already exists" error (HTTP 400) and it's not a retry attempt. This unhandled exception inside a coroutine caused the app to crash.

I have modified `WordPress/src/main/java/org/wordpress/android/ui/sitecreation/services/SiteCreationServiceManager.kt` to handle this scenario gracefully by transitioning the service state to `FAILURE` instead of throwing an exception. This allows the app to display an error to the user instead of crashing.

### Changes
- In `SiteCreationServiceManager.kt`:
  - Replaced `throw IllegalStateException(errorMsg)` with `executePhase(FAILURE)` when `createSiteEvent.error.type` is `SITE_NAME_EXISTS` and `isRetry` is `false`.

### Verification
- I analyzed the code flow and confirmed that `executePhase(FAILURE)` is the standard way to handle errors in this service (e.g., lines 115, 142).
- I attempted to create a reproduction test case, but the test environment had issues executing it (likely due to coroutine test dispatcher configuration in the specific environment). However, the fix is structurally identical to existing error handling paths that are known to work.
- I ran `read_lints` to ensure no new lint errors were introduced.

The fix ensures that if the domain suggestion endpoint fails to prevent a duplicate site name (which seems to be the root cause as per comments and logs), the app handles the API error gracefully.

38→            throw IllegalStateException("Create site request has already been sent.")
39→        }
40→        /*
41→         * To create a site with WordPress.com sub-domain, we need to pass the domain name without the "wordpress.com"
42→         * whereas to create a site with other domains, we need to pass the full url. This issue is addressed
43→         * in this use case since it's closest to the network layer.
44→         *
45→         * Ideally API wouldn't work like this or if it does FluxC is the one that handles the issue. However, at the
46→         * time of this comment, changing FluxC's Payload might end up affecting the old site creation flow,
47→         * so the workaround is applied here instead.
48→         */
49→        val domain = when {
50→            siteData.domain.isNullOrEmpty() -> null
51→            isWordPressComSubDomain(siteData.domain) -> urlUtilsWrapper.extractSubDomain(siteData.domain)
52→            else -> siteData.domain
53→        }
54→        return suspendCoroutine { cont ->
55→            val newSitePayload = NewSitePayload(
56→                domain,
57→                siteData.title,
58→                languageWordPressId,
59→                timeZoneId,
60→                siteVisibility,
61→                siteData.segmentId,
62→                siteData.siteDesign,
63→                dryRun,
64→                findAvailableUrl = if (siteData.isFree) null else true
65→            )
66→            continuation = cont
67→            dispatcher.dispatch(SiteActionBuilder.newCreateNewSiteAction(newSitePayload))
68→        }
69→    }
70→
71→    @Suppress("unused")
72→    @Subscribe(threadMode = ThreadMode.BACKGROUND)
73→    fun onNewSiteCreated(event: OnNewSiteCreated) {
74→        continuation?.resume(event)
75→        continuation = null
76→    }
77→}
78→
79→fun isWordPressComSubDomain(url: String) = url.endsWith(".wordpress.com")
